codeReview.summary: The commit redesigns slippage presets and input styling as required: presets now have pill/toggle styling with active inverse fill, input is rectangular with a visible border, font sizes for label/presets/hint are raised to 0.75rem, and a 375px media rule enforces >=32px touch targets and mobile fit. Existing JS logic already satisfies preset-input synchronization and custom-value de-highlighting behavior.

summary: Reviewed handoff, transcript skeleton, skill instructions, and commit 3683d6f diff. Implementation matches feature expected behavior and listed assertions for slippage UX redesign; no blocking or non-blocking issues found.
